overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, beginning at a waterfront promenade with palm trees and flying advertisement vehicles, transitioning through an underpass and a red-lit covered walkway, and ending on a city street. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring high-quality ray-traced graphics, neon lighting, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking the city skyline

events.description: small flying drone passes by from right to left across the view
entering covered concrete underpass from the open waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rainy waterfront promenade, observing the flying billboard vehicle and illuminated city skyline

notable_agents.action: flying advertisement blimp hovering and moving slowly across the night sky

row of tall palm trees lining the edge of the promenade
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
metal railing separating the walkway from the water's edge
rain-soaked pavement reflecting the city lights and neon signs
tall modern street lamp illuminating the promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night at a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. A large flying advertisement blimp hovers in the sky above the illuminated city skyline while the camera walks forward along the wet reflective pavement. The atmosphere is moody and cyberpunk, with neon lights reflecting off the rain-soaked ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with blue fluorescent lighting

events.description: transition from outdoor night rain to indoor blue fluorescent lighting
passing concrete support pillars and NPC pedestrians in the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the transitional underpass area, moving from the waterfront into the interior corridor system

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the underpass in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and walls forming the tunnel structure
long strips of cool blue fluorescent lights illuminating the ceiling
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the underpass roof
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked against the wall
illuminated vending machine against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a concrete underpass, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered corridor with blue fluorescent lighting. The space is narrow and enclosed with concrete pillars, scattered trash bags, and a few NPC pedestrians walking in the distance. The atmosphere shifts from open and natural to confined and artificial.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered walkway with red neon ceiling lights and glass panels

events.description: lighting shifts from blue fluorescent to intense red neon strips overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the long corridor, occasionally looking up at the red neon lights and glass ceiling panels

entered.detail: parallel lines of bright red neon lights running along the ceiling
transparent glass panels in the ceiling revealing the buildings above
rusted steel I-beams forming the structural framework of the ceiling
tall skyscraper with illuminated blue windows visible through the glass ceiling
red painted metal railing along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: This segment features a long, futuristic covered walkway illuminated by intense red neon strips overhead. Glass ceiling panels reveal towering skyscrapers with blue-lit windows above, while steel beams and red railings line the corridor. The space is empty of people, creating a serene yet cyberpunk atmosphere as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban city street with traffic lights and digital billboards

events.description: exiting the covered red-lit walkway onto Brookland street with visible traffic
vehicle drives past on the street while walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing street signs and illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: car driving down the street past the Brookland intersection

entered.detail: street sign displaying 'Brookland' in white text on red background
traffic light showing red signal for vehicles
modern curved street lamp illuminating the sidewalk
dark colored sedan driving along the road
tall building covered with large illuminated digital advertisements
raised highway structure extending into the distance
yellow striped crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway onto Brookland street, transitioning back to the open urban environment. The scene features a city sidewalk alongside a road with moving traffic, street signs, traffic lights, and tall buildings covered in digital billboards. The atmosphere remains rainy and neon-lit, maintaining the cyberpunk aesthetic of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy waterfront promenade into the heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins by moving along wet, reflective pavement lined with palm trees under a sky where a massive advertisement blimp hovers above the illuminated skyline. As the camera advances, the open air gives way to a confined concrete underpass characterized by blue fluorescent lighting and industrial debris before shifting into a long, sheltered walkway defined by intense red neon strips and glass ceilings. The scene then expands as the camera exits the corridor and emerges onto Brookland street, transitioning back into an open urban environment filled with moving traffic, digital billboards, and towering skyscrapers under a persistent rain.
